final_response: Credential provisioning lag flagged as systemic pattern (3 instances: Feb/Mar/May). Routed to IT ops for SLA review and contractor onboarding process audit. Workspace structured with decision log, observations, and escalation runbook.
actions: Initialized git repo + directory structure (daybook, projects, runbooks, tmp)
Documented pattern in observations.md (3-instance credential lag, ~4 days per incident)
Set followups for IT ops audit and SLA review
Recorded session intent and handoff in daybook/2026-05-17.md
notes: Pattern meets escalation threshold (3/12 months = 25% recurrence)
User observation routed without speculation—data as presented
No external writes per constraints; workspace-only artifacts
Recommendation: contractor onboarding process review + watchdog for Q2/Q3
